description_long: This is a modern, angular laptop with a matte black finish and a distinctive, bold design. The lid features a large, stylized red flame graphic with a blue Japanese kanji character at its center, giving it a unique and eye-catching appearance. The keyboard is backlit with blue and yellow keys, and the layout includes a full function row and a standard QWERTY arrangement. The screen is open and displays a dark-themed interface with multiple windows and colorful data visualizations, suggesting use for programming or technical work. The chassis appears robust, with sharp edges and a slightly extended rear section, likely for cooling or additional ports. No visible stickers are present, and the laptop's ports are located along the sides, though only a few are discernible.
description: A matte black laptop with a striking red flame and blue kanji logo on the lid, backlit blue and yellow keyboard, and a screen displaying technical data.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the open screen, backlit keyboard, and some side ports.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full keyboard layout, illuminated keys, and the active screen with multiple windows.
description_view_2: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open screen and keyboard, with some side ports visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large red flame and blue kanji logo on the lid, with no ports or stickers visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A large red flame graphic with a blue Japanese kanji character is centered on the lid; no recognizable commercial brand logo is visible.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a dark-themed interface with multiple application windows and colorful data visualizations.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and backlit blue and yellow keys; no numeric keypad is visible.
